name: Neem Oil
description: A potent Ayurvedic oil with powerful antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties for acne-prone skin.
scientificSummary: Contains nimbidin, azadirachtin, and gedunin — potent limonoids with proven antibacterial activity against P. acnes.
mechanismOfAction: Disrupts bacterial cell membranes and inhibits biofilm formation. Nimbidin inhibits cyclooxygenase pathways to reduce inflammation.

seo.title: Neem Oil - Ayurvedic Acne-Fighting Oil | Dew Theory
seo.description: Learn how Neem Oil's powerful antibacterial compounds target acne and fungal skin conditions.
